title: Kanto Wanderer
actors: Akira Kobayashi, Chieko Matsubara, Daisaburô Hirata
plot: Three schoolgirls are infatuated with a yakuza, Katsuta, of the Izu Clan. They meet another yakuza, `Diamond` Fuyu, of the rival Yoshida clan. As he gets a tattoo, two of the girls become squeamish and run off but Hanako, the best...
